name: Dried Beef Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the cream cheese, parmesan cheese, and horseradish in a bowl.
2. Stir in the chopped stuffed olives.
3. Shape the mixture into two rolls, each measuring approximately 6 inches long and 1 1/2 inches in diameter on waxed paper.
4. Wrap each roll tightly.
5. Chill for several hours or overnight to allow the mixture to firm up.
6. Once chilled, roll each log in finely snipped dried beef.
7. Serve with crackers.
